heading: Increasing youth recreation visits to Federal land
label: 8521 Increasing youth recreation visits to Federal land

children.heading: Strategy
children.label: a Strategy
children.text: Not later than 2 years after , the Secretaries, acting jointly, shall develop and make public a strategy to increase the number of youth recreation visits to Federal recreational lands and waters.January 4, 2025

children.label: A
children.text: emphasize increased recreation opportunities on Federal recreational lands and waters for underserved youth;

children.label: B
children.text: establish objectives and quantifiable targets for increasing youth recreation visits; and

children.label: C
children.text: provide the anticipated costs to achieve the objectives and meet the targets established under subparagraph (B); and
shall not establish any preference between similar recreation facilitated by noncommercial or commercial entities.

children.heading: Update to strategy
children.label: c Update to strategy
children.text: Not later than 5 years after the date of the publication of the strategy required under subsection (a), and every 5 years thereafter, the Secretaries shall update the strategy and make public the update.

children.heading: Agreements
children.label: d Agreements
children.text: The Secretaries may enter into contracts or cost-share agreements (including contracts or agreements for the acquisition of vehicles) to carry out this section.
